2026-06-24.text: The day was productive. Going to the gym earlier around 12:00pm helped to get out and not waste those afternoon hours. I went again later in the night and had a nice sauna session. This morning, I woke up at 9:03, did my premarket charting, walked Smokey, and then came back to my setup at around 9:26am. No trades today. As long as Im patient and then ACT when Im forced to, all is fine. Not in an egotistical way here, but I am at the peak of my trading, and Im only getting better. Focusing on protecting my energy and positive/correspondent frequencies have helped majorly recently, I should study that more. And as always, Im grateful for God for allowing me to be on this path, I love it.

2026-06-25.text:
Few Ideas:

- Turn Perrin's room into an office for me. ("mentor" wall panels, plants, good lighting, simplistic furniture. New desk and new chair.)
- Award a weekly/monthly server member, ex: "Elevated member of the week/month goes to __!" (adds points to their balance)

Today was good. Woke up right before market open but still got my charting and analysis done correctly, ended up not taking anything as the market just straight dumped. I worked today but was still able to hit the gym, getting back into that rhythm. Over the next few days, I want to continue to see growth and produce better content on TT, IG, and YT. I did exactly my main mission for the day "Productive and efficient, no time to waste today. Get everything done and grow my frequencies." For the upcoming YT vids, Claude will give me text and a Bookman of how the video will go. It will have that simple white or so background with images, simple text, and arrows breaking stuff down. I will continue to make good use of my time, and in that spare downtime, I will watch Anime instead of scrolling in bed. My frequencies are climbing and I thank the Almighty Lord for allowing me to chase everything and be present in life. Thank you God for everything, all of this. I will be home alone starting tomorrow night through Tuesday. Let's make it productive and beneficial.

[daily close]
rating: ★★★★ (great)
win: I got better and progressed today.
lesson: To love my life and the process/journey. Im grateful for God.
